rules.description: Core modules must stay independent from tray and GUI layers.

patterns.message: Core modules must not import tray or gui modules.

rules.description: GUI modules should not couple directly to tray runtime modules.

patterns.message: GUI modules must not import tray runtime modules.

rules.description: Tray UI should not probe backends directly; selection belongs in app or controller layers.

patterns.message: Tray UI should not import backend selection directly.

rules.description: Public GUI window modules should not import backend selection directly.

imports.message: GUI window modules should not import backend selection directly; move selection into bootstrap or target adapters.
GUI window modules should not import secondary-device route registries directly; resolve routes in bootstrap or adapters.

rules.description: Per-key GUI helpers should not import backend selection directly.

imports.message: Per-key GUI helpers should not import backend selection directly; expose backend and device access through bootstrap or injected helpers.

rules.description: Tray UI should not import core profile storage directly.

imports.message: Tray UI should not import core profile storage directly; use callbacks, app services, or controller adapters.

rules.description: Tray UI should not call or mutate private tray runtime hooks directly.

attributes.name: _update_menu
attributes.message: Tray UI should not call private tray menu refresh hooks directly; route through callbacks or app services.

attributes.name: _update_icon
attributes.message: Tray UI should not call private tray icon refresh hooks directly; route through callbacks or app services.

attributes.name: _start_current_effect
attributes.message: Tray UI should not start private tray effect hooks directly; delegate through effect-selection or controller adapters.

attributes.name: _system_power_last_ok
attributes.message: Tray UI should not mutate private tray runtime state directly; use an app-owned state or service boundary.

rules.description: The removed legacy effects ite_backend shim must stay unused.
